data.label: Datacenter
data.description: The big room with the loud fans and blinking lights.

data.label: Colo
data.description: Someone else's datacenter. Your problem anyway.

data.label: Power
data.description: PDUs, UPS, generators. The juice that keeps the lights on.

data.label: Cooling
data.description: CRAC units, hot/cold aisles. Fighting thermodynamics daily.

data.label: Cabling
data.description: The spaghetti monster lives here.

data.label: Core
data.description: Backbone routers and switches. The spine.

data.label: Edge
data.description: Where your network meets the chaos of the outside world.

data.label: Firewall
data.description: The wall. Rules upon rules. 'Deny all' energy.

data.label: Load Balancer
data.description: Traffic cop at the intersection of scale and failure.

data.label: Wireless
data.description: Magic invisible packets. 'Have you tried moving closer to the AP?'

data.label: VPN
data.description: Tunnels within tunnels. Split-brain debugging.

data.label: DNS
data.description: It's always DNS. Always.

data.label: Server
data.description: Bare metal. The real deal. No hypervisor between you and the silicon.

data.label: VM
data.description: Virtual machines. Servers pretending to be servers.

data.label: Container
data.description: Processes pretending to be VMs pretending to be servers.

data.label: Storage
data.description: SAN, NAS, object stores. Where bytes go to rest.

data.label: Cloud
data.description: Someone else's computer. Your credit card.

data.label: Kubernetes
data.description: Container orchestration. YAML all the way down.

data.label: OS
data.description: Operating systems. Kernel panics and init scripts.

data.label: Service
data.description: Daemons, systemd units, things that run forever (hopefully).

data.label: API
data.description: REST, GraphQL, gRPC. How things talk to things.

data.label: Middleware
data.description: Message queues, ESBs, the glue between systems.

data.label: Pipeline
data.description: CI/CD. Jenkins, GitLab, GitHub Actions. Build-test-deploy-pray.

data.label: Interface
data.description: UIs, CLIs, TUIs. The human-facing bits.

data.label: Protocol
data.description: HTTP, SMTP, SSH, custom binary nightmares.

data.label: Config
data.description: Ansible, Puppet, Chef, Terraform. Infrastructure as YAML/HCL/JSON/tears.

data.label: Database
data.description: SQL, NoSQL, NewSQL. Where state lives and queries go to die.

data.label: Warehouse
data.description: Data warehouses. Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery. Analytics at scale.

data.label: Lake
data.description: Data lakes. Dump everything, figure it out later. (They never do.)

data.label: ETL
data.description: Extract, Transform, Load. Data plumbing.

data.label: Analytics
data.description: BI tools, dashboards, reports nobody reads.

data.label: Governance
data.description: Data governance. Policies, lineage, who touched what when.

data.label: ML
data.description: Machine learning. Training models, deploying models, explaining why the model is wrong.
